title: ToolTreaux Straight Blade Stainless Steel Stork Embroidery Scissors - 3.5 Inch
description:
The ToolTreaux Stork scissors feature super sharp-tipped straight blades that are designed for precision cutting, making them ideal for thinner fabric materials, sewing, and embroider projects with thread. They are not meant for use with thicker fabric materials or yarn. The cute stork-themed scissors weigh just .1lbs and measure only 3.5” in length so they are a great portable scissor option. You can easily store them in your pocket, tool belt, sewing box, or craft storage container to keep them handy for on-the-go use. The scissor handle is made of durable alloy steel and the straight edge blades are made of corrosion-resistant stainless steel to ensure longer service life. Keep the blades sharp and count on them for many sewing and hobby craft uses

ToolTreaux Straight Blade Stainless Steel Stork Embroidery Scissors - 3.5 Inch

The ToolTreaux Stork scissors feature super sharp-tipped straight blades that are designed for precision cutting, making them ideal for thinner fabric materials, sewing, and embroider projects with thread. They are not meant for use with thicker fabric materials or yarn.

Key Features

  • STRAIGHT BLADE SCISSORS - ToolTreaux scissors feature super-sharp tipped straight blade edges that ensure precise cutting, ideal for thin fabric materials and embroidery projects with thread. Not designed for heavy fabric materials or yarn
  • LIGHTWEIGHT AND COMPACT - Cute stork-design scissors weigh just .1lbs and measure 3.5” in length, making them ideal for travel. Easily store them in your pocket, sewing box or craft storage when not in use; keep them handy for on the go use
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Scissor handle is made of durable alloy steel and the blades are made of corrosion-resistant stainless steel that won’t rust to provide a longer service life. Keep the blades sharp for many crafting and sewing uses
  • VERSATILE HOBBY TOOL - Originally designed for embroidery and sewing, these scissors are also useful for a wide variety of projects like needlework, dressmaking, tailoring and cutting delicate fishing lines
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: alloy steel (handle), stainless steel (blades); Design: stork, portable (pocket size); Dimensions: 3.5” x 1.63” x .15”; Weight: .1lbs (1.6oz); Color: chrome

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TTSTRKSCIS35
  • UPC: 810058486837
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: 3.5 in

The cute stork-themed scissors weigh just .1lbs and measure only 3.5” in length so they are a great portable scissor option. You can easily store them in your pocket, tool belt, sewing box, or craft storage container to keep them handy for on-the-go use.

The scissor handle is made of durable alloy steel and the straight edge blades are made of corrosion-resistant stainless steel to ensure longer service life. Keep the blades sharp and count on them for many sewing and hobby craft uses.

Although these scissors were originally designed with embroidery and sewing projects in mind, they are also great for a variety of other precision projects like dressmaking, needlework, tailoring, and cutting delicate fishing lines. Keep a pair of these compact scissors on hand - you never know when you’ll need them!
